name: Cheo Feliciano
abstract: Cheo Feliciano (3 July 1922 – 17 April 2014) was a Puerto Rican singer and composer of salsa and bolero music. Feliciano was the owner of a recording company called "Coche Records".

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Hommy - A Latin Opera
Eddie Palmieri, Cheo Feliciano, and Tipica 73

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Malone
about_quotes.evidence: I played on all the salsa recordings in New York too. Fania Records, 1974, ’75, ’76. Willie Colon, Hector Lavoe, Ruben Blades, Johnny Pacheco, Mongo Santamaria, the Lebron brothers. All those guys. Cheo Feliciano.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Malone interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2023
